query_text: versatile one-ski quiver around 96-100mm waist for mixed conditions

results.explanation: Nordica Santa Ana 98 strongly matches on: damp, versatility. Moderate match on: stiffness, powder_float. Review: "surprising dampness" Review: "Damp and composed for its weight class" Review: "enough float for our wetter powder"

Nordica Enforcer 100 strongly matches on: damp, versatility. Moderate match on: powder_float. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "Stiff enough for experts but not punishing" Review: "impressive stiffness for all-mountain ski" Review: "titanal makes it damp"

Moderate match on: stiffness, damp, powder_float. Review: "At 96mm they're right in the sweet spot" Review: "carbon Amphibio construction is unique — different flex on each edge for easier turn initiation" Review: "Edge grip is good but not outstanding. Not as damp as heavier titanal skis."

Volkl Mantra M6 strongly matches on: damp. Moderate match on: powder_float. Weak match on: stiffness. Review: "incredibly stiff" Review: "incredibly stiff and powerful" Review: "absolutely damp all-mountain ski available"

ground_truth.reason: 102mm waist, slightly wider than ideal but versatile
